decks.notes: The main goal of this deck is to assemble the perfect sequence of cards to win the game in a single turn by casting Doomsday and setting up a winning combination involving Thassa's Oracle. The deck includes various cantrips and protection spells to help dig through the deck quickly, while also disrupting the opponent's game plan. With the right combination of cards and careful planning, this combo deck can secure victory in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

This deck focuses on controlling the opponent by utilizing lands to disrupt their strategy while setting up a win condition with cards like Dark Depths. It also uses cards like Sphere of Resistance and Wasteland to slow down the opponent's plays. The deck aims to establish a strong board presence and lock the opponent out of the game by denying them resources. It has a strong synergy between land cards and spells that interact with the opponent's board, making it a versatile and adaptive control deck.

The deck is focused on maintaining control of the game through disruption spells like Force of Will and Daze, while also utilizing efficient creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent to apply pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes card advantage engines like Mishra's Bauble and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to ensure consistent resource flow. By combining efficient creatures with disruptive spells and card advantage, the deck aims to quickly take control of the game and maintain the upper hand until victory is achieved.

The primary focus of this deck is to maintain control over the game through a combination of cheap and efficient spells while also applying pressure with aggressive creatures. By utilizing a mix of disruption and card advantage, the deck aims to tempo out the opponent and maintain a fast clock to close out the game before the opponent can stabilize. The deck achieves this by utilizing powerful tempo plays such as countering spells with Daze and Force of Will, disrupting the opponent's mana base with Wasteland, and applying pressure with efficient threats like Delver of Secrets and Dragon's Rage Channeler.

This Legacy 1 vs 1 deck utilizes a Storm combo strategy to quickly generate a high storm count and cast a devastating Tendrils of Agony to win the game. It focuses on fast mana acceleration using cards like Mox Opal, Lion's Eye Diamond, and Lotus Petal, as well as powerful card draw with Echo of Eons and Song of Creation. Burning Wish serves as a versatile tutor to access key combo pieces, while The Fantasticar provides protection and versatility. The deck aims to set up a winning Tendrils of Agony finish through a combination of efficient mana generation and spell casting.

This Legacy 1 vs 1 combo deck focuses on utilizing artifact creatures and various artifacts to generate value and create powerful synergies. By combining cards like Mishra's Bauble, Mox Opal, and Urza's Bauble with cards like Goblin Welder, Emry, Lurker of the Loch, and Goblin Engineer, the deck aims to assemble key pieces like Legion Extruder and Agatha's Soul Cauldron to create explosive plays. With access to powerful lands like Urza's Saga and Volcanic Island, this deck aims to consistently generate advantage and overwhelm opponents with its intricate combo interactions.

The main concept of this Mardu Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures, disruption spells, and versatile removal options. By utilizing powerful creatures like Voice of Victory and Amped Raptor, along with cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Swords to Plowshares for removal, the deck aims to control the battlefield and deal damage quickly. With a mix of creatures, disruption, and removal, the deck is designed to apply pressure and disrupt the opponent's game plan, leading to a fast and decisive victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and efficient spells to disrupt opponents' game plans while maintaining pressure. Cards like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent are used to quickly clock opponents while disruptive spells like Force of Will and Daze protect your threats. Wasteland and tempo plays like Prismari Charm and Flow State help control the board and slow down opponents. The deck's mana base allows for quick and consistent starts, ensuring that you can deploy threats and disrupt opponents' strategies efficiently.

The deck aims to aggressively utilize artifacts and blue cards to quickly assemble powerful synergies and overwhelm the opponent. By combining cards like Mox Opal, Urza's Saga, and Emry, Lurker of the Loch, the deck generates mana advantage and card advantage while disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Force of Will and Sink into Stupor. The inclusion of powerful artifacts like Tormod's Crypt and Pithing Needle further enhances the deck's ability to control the game and protect its key pieces, ultimately leading to a fast and efficient victory.

This deck aims to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, then bring them back into play using cards like Reanimate and Animate Dead. By using cards like Thoughtseize and Unmask to disrupt the opponent's game plan, this deck looks to combo off and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and game-ending abilities. The key strategy focuses on leveraging the graveyard as a resource to cheat massive threats into play early in the game and create an insurmountable advantage.

This deck focuses on using lands as control elements, utilizing cards like Wasteland and Ghost Quarter to disrupt the opponent's mana base. The main win condition is the combo of Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage to create a 20/20 indestructible Marit Lage token. Life from the Loam ensures a constant stream of lands to fuel this strategy, while cards like Crop Rotation and Expedition Map help find key pieces. The deck also includes disruption elements like Grafdigger's Cage and Pithing Needle to disrupt the opponent's game plan while Boseiju, Who Endures provides protection for important spells.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to create a prison-like control over the game, with cards like Trinisphere and Planar Nexus to limit opponent's options. The key win conditions involve cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, Eye of the Storms to control the board, while also utilizing powerful artifacts such as The One Ring and Candelabra of Tawnos for additional advantages. The deck aims to establish dominance through a combination of resource denial, disruption, and powerful artifact synergies to ultimately secure victory in the long game.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly assemble a powerful storm combo that can deal lethal damage to the opponent. The deck focuses on setting up a fast mana base with cards like Mox Opal and Lotus Petal, then storming off with spells like Dark Ritual and Infernal Tutor to generate a large storm count. This allows the player to cast a lethal Tendrils of Agony or Ad Nauseam to close out the game. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Thoughtseize and Duress to protect the combo.

The main strategy of this deck is to utilize the powerful Doomsday combo, which involves using cards like Dark Ritual to generate mana quickly, followed by casting Doomsday to set up a winning combination of cards from the library. By carefully sequencing spells and managing resources, the player can assemble the necessary pieces to win the game in a single turn. Additionally, the deck includes disruption in the form of counterspells like Force of Will and hand disruption like Thoughtseize to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's game plan.

This deck focuses on assembling a powerful combination of artifacts, including The One Ring, Mishra's Research Desk, and Tezzeret, Cruel Captain, to generate significant card advantage and mana acceleration. By using cards like Voltaic Key and Manifold Key to untap artifacts like Grim Monolith and Urza's Bauble, the deck can quickly ramp up to powerful threats like Glaring Fleshraker and The Fantasticar. With disruptive pieces like Portable Hole and Tormod's Crypt, this deck aims to control the game while setting up its powerful combo pieces for a decisive victory.

The deck revolves around utilizing High Tide to generate mana, allowing for big combo plays with cards like Time Spiral and Brain Freeze. Teferi, Time Raveler helps protect against disruption, while spells like Force of Will provide additional protection. The deck also includes cantrips like Brainstorm and Ponder to dig for combo pieces. Lórien Revealed serves as a way to draw cards and filter through the deck. Mystic Sanctuary helps to recur key spells, while the mana base is focused on Islands to maximize High Tide's potential.
